title: Streaming 事件类型与消息生命周期
title_en: Streaming Event Types and Message Lifecycle

body.concept: 一次 streaming 响应由一系列 SSE 事件组成，遵循固定的生命周期：message_start → content_block_start → content_block_delta（重复多次，每次携带一小段文本）→ content_block_stop → message_delta（携带 stop_reason 和 usage）→ message_stop。每个 content block 对应 Message 里的一个内容块（文本或 tool_use）。如果 Claude 返回多个 content block（如先文本后工具调用），会看到多轮 start/delta/stop 序列。
body.analogy: 像快递追踪：message_start 是「订单已创建」，content_block_delta 是不断更新的「运输中」状态，message_stop 是「已签收」。你不必等包裹到了才知道它的状态——每个节点实时推送。

body_en.concept: A streaming response is a sequence of SSE events following a fixed lifecycle: message_start → content_block_start → content_block_delta (repeated, each carrying a text chunk) → content_block_stop → message_delta (with stop_reason and usage) → message_stop. Each content block maps to one entry in the Message's content array (text or tool_use). If Claude returns multiple blocks (e.g., text then a tool call), you'll see multiple start/delta/stop sequences.
body_en.analogy: Like package tracking: message_start is 'order placed', content_block_delta is the 'in transit' updates, and message_stop is 'delivered'. You don't wait for the package to arrive to know its status — each checkpoint pushes in real time.

diagram:
```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([message_start]) --> B[block_start]
    B --> C[delta]
    C --> D[delta ...]
    D --> E[block_stop]
    E -->|repeat × N| B
    E --> F[message_delta]
    F --> G([message_stop])
```
